74.reason: [The function getWord always returns 0, so the loop condition is always true, causing infinite loop. It should return EOF or another indicator to stop when end of file is reached. Also, the logic in getWord skips all non-alphabetic characters including EOF handling incorrectly.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  [The function getWord always returns 0, so the loop condition is always true, causing infinite loop. It should return EOF or another indicator to stop when end of file is reached. Also, the logic in getWord skips all non-alphabetic characters including EOF handling incorrectly.]
